title: Improve Expense Tracker UI: White/Blue Theme, Rounded Cards, Bold Amounts

requirements.text: Apply a white background (#FFFFFF) as the global app background across all screens, replacing any existing dark or coloured backgrounds.
acceptanceCriteria: All screens (Dashboard, ExpenseList, AddExpense, Calculator, Settings) render with a white background.
No dark or off-white background colours remain on the main content area.

requirements.text: Use a cohesive blue colour scheme for primary actions, accents, navigation highlights, buttons, progress bars, and chart colours. Use a single primary blue (e.g. #2563EB) and a lighter blue tint (e.g. #EFF6FF) for card headers or highlighted areas.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary action buttons and active navigation items are styled in the primary blue colour.
Category breakdown progress bars and chart elements use the blue palette.
No conflicting accent colours remain from the previous theme.

requirements.text: Restyle all cards (TotalsCards, CategoryBreakdown, ExpenseList items, DashboardScreen chart containers) with a border-radius of 12px, a white card background, a subtle light grey or blue-tinted border, and a soft box shadow for depth.
acceptanceCriteria: All card components have border-radius of 12px.
Cards have a visible but subtle shadow and border to separate them from the white background.

requirements.text: Display expense amount values in bold font weight (font-bold or font-semibold) across ExpenseList items, TotalsCards, and the Calculator session list so amounts are visually prominent.
acceptanceCriteria: Amount values in ExpenseList, TotalsCards, and CalculatorSessionList are rendered in bold or semi-bold weight.
Amounts are visually distinct from description and category text.

requirements.text: Render date values in a small font size (text-xs or text-sm) and grey colour (e.g. #9CA3AF) across ExpenseList items, CalculatorSessionList, and any other places dates appear, so they are secondary to the amount and description.
acceptanceCriteria: Date text is noticeably smaller than the expense title and amount.
Date text colour is a muted grey.
Dates appear consistently styled across all expense-displaying components.

requirements.text: Improve spacing throughout the app: increase padding inside cards (at least 16px), add consistent vertical gaps between list items and cards (at least 12px), and ensure section headings have adequate top/bottom margin. Remove any cramped or inconsistent spacing inherited from the previous theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Card internal padding is at least 16px on all sides.
Vertical gaps between list items are at least 12px.
No elements appear visually cramped or overlapping.

requirements.text: Update the global CSS variables and Tailwind theme tokens in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js to reflect the new white background, blue primary, grey text, and 12px border-radius as defaults so the design is consistent across light mode.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS custom properties for background, primary, and radius are updated.
Tailwind config reflects the updated colour tokens and border-radius.
All components that use these tokens automatically reflect the new design without per-component overrides.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change any backend logic or data models.
Do not alter the app's routing structure or screen layout hierarchy.
nonGoals: Changing dark mode styles (focus is on light/white mode only).
Changing navigation structure or screen flow.
